style.styleSentence: A hard-hitting instrumental track at roughly 96 BPM featuring gritty drums, a pounding kick, and a dirty bassline that drives an aggressive male vocal delivery focused on gym endurance and internal pressure without any melodic hooks or cinematic buildup.
style.vocalStyle: Relentless flowing cadence with controlled aggression

sections.text:
Beat drop, shoes tied, hood up, door slam
Still half tired but I move like a grown man
No speech, no hype, no coach in my ear
Just that old weak voice that I came here to kill
I don’t feel ready, that’s the point of it
Same cold walk, same joints feeling stiff
Gym lights buzzing, bag on the floor
I’m not in the mood, so I need it more
First set ugly, second set clean
Third set looking like I might get mean
Hands on the bar, grip chalked white
I don’t trust motivation, I trust what I write
Log book open, numbers in ink
Either add one rep or adjust how I think
I’m not here flexing, I’m not here cute
I came to tell my softer side, “shut up and move”

I keep pushing till the arms lock up
Till the lungs burn dry and the heartbeat jump
Till the sweat drip down and the vision blur
I don’t care how bad that pressure hurt
Another set, another plate, another war
Another voice in my head I ignore
If I came this far, I ain’t slowing down
I don’t stop, I don’t quit right now

Bench feel heavy, good, let it be
That’s the same weight standing between me and me
Two plates talking like, “you sure you him?”
I unrack slow with a shark-fin grin
Elbows tucked, chest tight, breath held
World get quiet when the barbell fell
Touch and press, no panic, no bounce
That’s one more reason I don’t count myself out
Squats on deck, legs already mad
But I don’t negotiate with habits I had
Deep breath, brace, spine locked in
Pain in the hole but I drive through it
Deadlift day got truth in the steel
You can’t fake heart when the knurling feel real
Bar don’t care what excuse you brought
It only moves when your whole soul talks

I keep pushing till the arms lock up
Till the lungs burn dry and the heartbeat jump
Till the sweat drip down and the vision blur
I don’t care how bad that pressure hurt
Another set, another plate, another war
Another voice in my head I ignore
If I came this far, I ain’t slowing down
I don’t stop, I don’t quit right now

Whey in the shaker, meals in the bag
Macros boring, but the mirror don’t cap
Casein late night, water all day
Stretch when I’m stiff so I don’t break
Skull crushers burn, planks make me shake
Crunches got fire running under my waist
Push-ups after, just to prove I’m sick
Not sick like ill, sick like disciplined
This ain’t about abs, this ain’t about arms
This about keeping one promise through storms
This about becoming the proof I need
When my own damn mind start testing me
No perfect week, no perfect mood
Just imperfect days where I still follow through
I don’t need applause, I don’t need a crown
I need one more rep when I wanna sit down

I keep pushing till the arms lock up
Till the lungs burn dry and the heartbeat jump
Till the sweat drip down and the vision blur
I don’t care how bad that pressure hurt
Another set, another plate, another war
Another voice in my head I ignore
If I came this far, I ain’t slowing down
I don’t stop, I don’t quit right now

I picture summer, but I don’t daydream
I put that beach body under a machine
I put that cocktail far down the road
I put today’s work where excuses go
Money right, mind right, body getting sharp
Code on the screen after reps in the dark
Not trying to be perfect, trying to be dangerous
Trying to walk in like pressure made sense
Some days I’m strong, some days I crawl
Some days just showing up wins it all
But skip too much and the old me grows
So I cut that off before it gets close
I know that voice, I know that trap
“Take one day,” then the hunger goes flat
Nah, not today, not this round
I came in tired, I leave with the crown

I keep pushing till the arms lock up
Till the lungs burn dry and the heartbeat jump
Till the sweat drip down and the vision blur
I don’t care how bad that pressure hurt
Another set, another plate, another war
Another voice in my head I ignore
If I came this far, I ain’t slowing down
I don’t stop, I don’t quit right now

No speech.
No excuse.
One more rep.
Then another.
